productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Printed Maroon Tshirts
description: CompositionRed melange round neck t-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, has a ribbed round neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves and slightly distressed look print on the front that spills over to the back on the left side seamFittingRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryBold and stylish, this red melange t-shirt from united colors of benetton is perfect for casual wear. The distressed look image on the chest of a vintage cycle exudes a funky vibe, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans and canvas shoes for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-18.5"
